summary.intent: Implement GitHub issue #205 (Group agnostic core Rust component), then improve the development workflow by creating a Codex review-wait skill and a lighter local CI gate (`cargo xci --profile fast`).
summary.outcome: Group component fully implemented (694-line group.rs, 33 unit + 5 snapshot tests, 100% coverage, 0 missed mutations), PR #648 opened. `waiting-for-codex-review` skill created in the repo. `cargo xci --profile fast` implemented (1m24s vs ~25min full), with `xci-fast` alias. Two commits staged locally, not yet pushed pending Codex review resolution.

repo: `crates/ars-components/src/utility/separator.rs` is the canonical template for new stateless utility components (446 lines, identical structure).
CLAUDE.md is a symlink to AGENTS.md — edits must target AGENTS.md directly.
`.claude/skills/` resolves via symlink to `.agents/skills/` — skills belong in the repo under `.agents/skills/`, not globally.
Spec is authoritative ('spec is the contract'); when issue test bullets contradict the spec, spec wins and the bullets are dropped.
GroupContext naming convention comes from foundation 08 §8.4 — use descriptive non-prefixed names (`GroupContext`, not `Context`) so consumers write `group::GroupContext`.
Spec-conformance anatomy tests live in `crates/ars-components/tests/spec_conformance/utility.rs` and must be added for each new component.
`snapshot-reviewed` label must be applied to any PR that introduces new `.snap` files.
Codex bot login is `chatgpt-codex-connector`; it posts 👀 while reviewing, then drops 👀 — replaced by 👍 on approval or removed when threads are posted.
`@codex review` comment must be posted after first push (auto-trigger is unreliable) and after each subsequent fix push.
cargo xci full profile ~25 min; fast profile (10 of 20 steps) runs in ~1m24s on a warm cache. Coverage and FeatureMatrix* steps are the main cost drivers.

code.finding: Structural template for stateless utility components; group.rs was modeled on this file.
Pattern for a secondary context struct (FieldContext); used as reference for GroupContext design.
`Direction::as_html_attr` — used by group.rs to emit the `dir` attribute.
Step enum and PIPELINE_ORDER definition; Profile enum and FAST_PIPELINE_ORDER added here alongside existing tests module at line 1212.
Ci subcommand definition; `--profile <full|fast>` flag added here, default Full for backward compat.
Spec-conformance anatomy tests; `group_anatomy_matches_spec` was missing and added during post-implementation-audit Phase 2 Round 1.

workflow: post-implementation-audit skill is mandatory per CLAUDE.md §7; runs three phases: spec/impl drift, iterative 'anything else missing?' rounds (≥2 clean rounds to terminate), and test coverage audit.
cargo insta workflow: run tests → `.snap.new` files generated → read and verify each → `cargo insta accept` → commit snapshots with implementation.
cargo mutants validates test suite quality beyond coverage; unviable mutations (const fn, builder return-self) are expected and not failures.
Pre-existing doc check warnings (`cargo doc`) exist in the workspace and are not CI-gated — distinguish new warnings from baseline before reporting.
Snapshot orphan gate must be run without a per-crate filter or other crates' snapshots appear unreferenced (false positive).
Two separate commits strategy: implementation commit first, then infra/workflow commit; push both together after Codex review loop completes.
Soft-resetting a premature commit (`git reset --soft HEAD~1`) preserves all staged changes and is the safe recovery when committing before user review.

friction: Issue #205 test bullets contradicted the spec (`label`/`label_id` props that don't exist); required explicit resolution decision before implementation could start.
Spec §3.1 prose contradicted §1.2 code example (role=Presentation state-attr behavior); required accessibility-grounded decision and spec rewrite.
CLAUDE.md symlink indirection caused an initial failed edit attempt before discovering AGENTS.md is the real file.
.claude/skills symlink caused skill to be placed globally before user corrected it to the repo's .agents/skills/ directory.
Snapshot orphan gate produced false positives when filtered to a single crate; required re-running without the filter.
cargo xci (~25 min locally) was the motivation to build xci-fast, but this added a full planning + implementation cycle to the session.
Commit landed before user could review the diff; required a soft-reset and re-commit workflow.
open_items: PR #648 reviews from Codex still need to be addressed (the review-wait skill was built but the actual review-fix work was deferred to after both commits are pushed together).
Both local commits (Group implementation + xci-fast infra) are not yet pushed to origin; awaiting Codex review resolution before the combined push.
Leptos adapter for Group component (`ars-leptos`) — deferred to a separate task.
Dioxus adapter for Group component (`ars-dioxus`) — deferred to a separate task.
GroupContext consumption wiring into existing child components (Button, TextField, etc.) — deferred to cross-component follow-up tasks.
`--exclude <step>` flag for ad-hoc subtraction from xci profiles — deferred.
Pre-push git hook to auto-run `cargo xci-fast` — deferred.
Pre-existing doc check warnings (`cargo doc` baseline tech debt) in the workspace — not introduced by this PR but unresolved.
Flipping `cargo xci` no-arg default from `full` to `fast` — deliberately deferred for backward compat with external scripts.
